description: Voice bar capsule webview. Subscribes to soto://voice-runtime broadcasts emitted by the Rust runtime so the overlay can transition between idle/listening/thinking/error. The other commands this webview calls (cancel_active_voice_runtime, get_app_settings) are user-registered via invoke_handler and not ACL-gated. See sotoapp-tauri-2-acl-gotcha memory + decision.md D32.
